ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Symbolic link (across volumes, but needs admin!)
ast.target: 符号链接（跨卷，但需要管理员权限！）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the folder you want to create a symlink to. The source directory needs to exist.
ast.target: 这是您想要创建符号链接的文件夹。源目录必须存在。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the path where the symlink will be created. The target directory should not exist and will be newly created.
ast.target: 这是将创建符号链接的路径。目标目录不应存在，并将被新建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the type of link to create.
ast.target: 选择要创建的链接类型。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is the path where the symlink will be created. The target file path should not exist and will be newly created.
ast.target: 这是将创建符号链接的路径。目标文件路径不应存在，并将被新建。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This plugin only works on desktop.
ast.target: 此插件仅适用于桌面端。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Source file path does not exist. Please ensure it does. Symlinks cannot be created if the source file path does not exist.
ast.target: 源文件路径不存在。请确保其存在。如果源文件路径不存在，则无法创建符号链接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Target file path exist. Please ensure it does not. Symlinks cannot be created if the target file path already exists.
ast.target: 目标文件路径已存在。请确保其不存在。如果目标文件路径已存在，则无法创建符号链接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Source path does not exist. Please ensure it does. Symlinks cannot be created if the source path does not exist.
ast.target: 源路径不存在。请确保其存在。如果源路径不存在，则无法创建符号链接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Target path exist. Please ensure it does not. Symlinks cannot be created if the target path already exists.
ast.target: 目标路径已存在。请确保其不存在。如果目标路径已存在，则无法创建符号链接。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Creates a symlink to a folder
ast.target: 创建指向文件夹的符号链接

ast.name: name
ast.source: Creates a symlink to a file
ast.target: 创建指向文件的符号链接
